tasks.label: check-local-port
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -Property LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess; if ($?) { '' }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -Property LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess

tasks.label: launch-dev-detached
args: $out='.next-dev.out.log'; $err='.next-dev.err.log'; if (Test-Path $out) { Remove-Item $out -Force }; if (Test-Path $err) { Remove-Item $err -Force }; $p = Start-Process -FilePath cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c npm run dev -- --port 3000' -WorkingDirectory $PWD -RedirectStandardOutput $out -RedirectStandardError $err -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $listen = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($listen) { 'DEV_SERVER_UP'; 'PID=' + $p.Id } else { 'DEV_SERVER_DOWN'; 'PID=' + $p.Id; if (Test-Path $err) { Get-Content $err -TotalCount 80 } }

tasks.label: check-next-bin
args: if exist node_modules\.bin\next.cmd (echo NEXT_OK) else (echo NEXT_MISSING)

tasks.label: verify-next-after-install
args: if exist node_modules\.bin\next.cmd (echo NEXT_OK) else (echo NEXT_MISSING)

tasks.label: cache-clean-and-ci
args: npm cache clean --force && rmdir /s /q node_modules && npm ci --ignore-scripts

tasks.label: force-wipe-node-modules
args: mkdir __empty__ && robocopy __empty__ node_modules /MIR >nul & rmdir /s /q node_modules & rmdir /s /q __empty__
